fields.name: Deep Tissue and Sport Massage
fields.description: Targeted relief for chronic tension and athletic recovery. This therapy focuses on realigning deeper layers of muscles and connective tissue to improve mobility and reduce pain.

fields.name: Spa Therapy
fields.description: A sanctuary for your mind and body. Our restorative Spa Therapy sessions are designed to lower cortisol levels, improve circulation, and provide a profound sense of relaxation.

fields.name: Advanced Soft Tissue Mobilization
fields.description: Combining IASTM and Percussive Therapy to effectively break down scar tissue and myofascial restrictions.

fields.name: Kinesiotaping
fields.description: Functional support without restricting movement. Kinesiotaping helps stabilize joints, reduce inflammation, and enhance natural healing processes.
